features.title: SEC EDGAR client + XBRL parser + ratio computation + FundamentalsLoader 抽象
features.acceptance: (1) 新建 workbench_api/data/fundamentals_loader.py：抽象基类 FundamentalsLoader + dataclass FundamentalsRow (B025 fixture **12 列 schema 严格一致**，列序：report_date / ticker / fiscal_quarter / **fiscal_quarter_end** / roe / gross_margin / fcf_yield / debt_to_assets / pe / pb / ev_ebitda / earnings_yield；fiscal_quarter 格式 '2014Q4' 无短横线 — pre-impl 裁决 2026-05-26 决议 #1+#2)；(2) 新建 workbench_api/data/sec_edgar_loader.py：SECEDGARFundamentalsLoader 继承 FundamentalsLoader；BASE_URL = 'https://data.sec.gov'；User-Agent header 含 os.environ['SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL']（永久边界 (h)；缺时 raise RuntimeError 含修复指引）；httpx.Client 30s timeout；SimpleRateLimit(10, period_sec=1.0) 限速 (永久边界 (i))；fetch_quarterly_fundamentals 调 companyfacts API + parse JSON + compute_ratios → list[FundamentalsRow]；**拿到 null CIK 时 raise ValueError('Synthetic ticker X has no SEC filing; skip in backfill driver')**（pre-impl 裁决决议 #3）；health_check GET AAPL submissions 200；(3) 新建 workbench_api/data/xbrl_parser.py：8 ratio 计算函数 (公式锁定 strategy doc §6；永久边界 (j))；(4) workbench_api/config.py 加 SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL 读取；(5) .env.example 加 SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL=research@example.com 注释含 SEC 政策说明；(6) 新建 workbench_api/data/fixtures/sec_edgar_responses/ 含 aapl_companyfacts.json + nvda_companyfacts.json + **ticker_cik_map.json (B025 universe 全部 30 ticker → CIK 映射：27 真 CIK + 3 synthetic ZQAI/ZQPT/ZQLH 映射 null)**（pre-impl 裁决决议 #3）；(7) **仅 stdlib + httpx 不引入新 dep**（companyfacts API 走 JSON 不需 lxml；spec §6 YAGNI 第 8 条 + pre-impl 裁决决议 #4）；若未来真需走 raw XBRL XML 解析按 v0.9.29 §12.8 走规约 [project].dependencies + CRITICAL_RUNTIME_DEPS；(8) deploy.sh 加 pre-flight check：if -z SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL exit 1 (v0.9.25 §12.5 模式)；(9) pytest ≥12 测试：抽象 instantiation / 缺 email RuntimeError / health_check happy + 403 / mock AAPL companyfacts 4 quarters / mock 5xx 3 次重试 / mock 429 rate limit / 10/sec 限速断言 (11 calls > 1 sec) / 8 ratio 独立函数测试 (AAPL sample) / 零分母 / missing field ValueError / **ticker_cik_map 含 30 ticker（27 真 + 3 null）** / null CIK fetch raise ValueError / User-Agent header 含 email / **FundamentalsRow frozen + slots + 12 字段（含 fiscal_quarter_end: date）**；(10) Gates: pytest tests ≥304 baseline (B028) + ≥12 = ≥316 / ruff exit=0 / mypy exit=0 / frontend 不破 vitest ≥166；(11) 不动 B027/B028 既有 tiingo_loader / yfinance_loader / cost_guard / snapshot_loader / B025 fixture / strategy / B026 banner / production deploy。

features.title: Backfill driver + storage 填充 + universe 配置
features.acceptance: (1) 新建 scripts/backfill_fundamentals.py：argparse --from --to --tickers | --universe us_quality；默认 us_quality 调 scripts/universe_us_quality.py；对每 ticker 调 SECEDGARFundamentalsLoader.fetch_quarterly_fundamentals (rate limit 自动)；**catch ValueError(Synthetic ticker...) + log warn + skip 不阻塞批次**（pre-impl 裁决决议 #3 fail-safe 设计）；写 vendor raw data/snapshots/fundamentals/sec_edgar/<CIK>/<accession>/{10-K,10-Q,metadata.json,parsed_ratios.json}；append unified data/snapshots/fundamentals/unified/fundamentals.csv (sort + dedupe by (ticker, fiscal_quarter) + atomic write)；validate 行数 ≈ **27 真 ticker × 40 quarters ≈ 1080 ± 10%**（3 synthetic null CIK skip 不计入）；(2) 新建 scripts/universe_us_quality.py：固定 list 与 B025 fixture data/fixtures/us_quality_momentum/universe.csv ticker 列一致 (**30 ticker，含 3 synthetic ZQAI/ZQPT/ZQLH**；synthetic 不入 SEC backfill 但仍入 universe 列表保 B025 既有回测 deterministic)；(3) 新建 scripts/ticker_to_cik.py：one-shot 调 SEC ticker → CIK + cache 到 workbench_api/data/fixtures/sec_edgar_responses/ticker_cik_map.json (synthetic ticker 映射 null)；(4) 本批次手动跑 backfill 一次入仓：python scripts/backfill_fundamentals.py --from 2014-01-01 --to 2026-05-26 --universe us_quality；产物 **27 真 ticker CIK 目录** (3 synthetic null CIK log warn skip) + 1 unified fundamentals.csv **≥1000 行 ≈ 27 × 40 quarter** 本机存在；commit message + signoff 记录 row count + skip 的 synthetic ticker 列表；(5) 跑一次抽样 PIT 验证：抽 3-5 真 ticker × 5 fiscal_quarter；断言 **直接读 fixture / unified 第 4 列 fiscal_quarter_end**（pre-impl 裁决决议 #1）：fiscal_quarter_end < report_date + report_date >= fiscal_quarter_end + 30d (B025 §4.1 enforcement)；报告存为 docs/test-reports/B029-pit-validation-2026-MM-DD.md；(6) pytest ≥10 测试：backfill argparse + 默认 / universe_us_quality 含 **30 ticker (含 3 synthetic)** + 与 B025 fixture universe 一致 / mock SECEDGAR backfill 写 vendor + unified schema correct / sort + dedupe by (ticker, fiscal_quarter) / row count ≥ 27 真 × 40 = 1080 (allow ±10%) / atomic write / ticker_to_cik 输出 cache JSON schema (synthetic 映射 null) / partial unified merge 不重复 / PIT spot check report_date >= fiscal_quarter_end + 30d (直接读 unified 第 4 列) / **B025 schema 12 列严格一致** / **3 synthetic ticker (ZQAI/ZQPT/ZQLH) backfill log warn + skip 不阻塞**；(7) Gates: pytest tests ≥316 + ≥10 = ≥326 / ruff + mypy 清 / 本机跑通 27 真 ticker backfill (SEC 10 req/sec 下 5-10 分钟) / PIT validation 报告通过；(8) 不动 F001 已完成的接口 / B027/B028 既有 loader / scripts。

features.title: PIT fundamentals loader + strategy 读路径准备
features.acceptance: (1) 改 trade/data/loader.py：加 load_fundamentals(tickers: list[str], as_of_date: date) → dict[str, FundamentalsRow | None]；PIT enforcement: effective_date = report_date + 1 business day (pandas.tseries.offsets.BusinessDay)；返回每 ticker 最新 effective_date <= as_of_date 的行；读 data/snapshots/fundamentals/unified/fundamentals.csv if exists；else fall back B025 fixture；docstring 明示 PIT 语义 + effective_date 计算；(2) 不动 strategy 代码 (B025 us_quality_momentum 5 因子 / Master Portfolio 等不切实际读路径；F003 仅准备 loader infrastructure；切换是 B030 责任)；(3) pytest ≥10 测试：load_fundamentals(['AAPL'], as_of=2020-03-01) 返回 2019-Q3 或之前 / load_fundamentals(['NVDA'], as_of=2020-04-01) 返回 2019-Q4 / unified.csv 存在读 unified else fall back B025 fixture / 既有 B025 us_quality_momentum 5 因子测试全过 / as_of_date 未来限到今天 / as_of_date < earliest data 返 dict 全 None / 多 ticker 一次 load / 某 ticker 缺数据 None 其他正常 / effective_date business_days(1) 跳周末 / PIT spot check 3-5 random (ticker, as_of_date) tuple；(4) Gates: pytest tests ≥326 + ≥10 = ≥336 / ruff + mypy 清 / **B025 既有回测 deterministic 不变** (pytest 跑 us_quality_momentum 回测断言 fixture 路径下数字不变 B025 既有测试 100% 通过)；(5) 不动 strategy 代码 (Master / sleeve / signal / construction) / Backtest engine / workbench backend endpoints / Frontend UI。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内): F001-F003 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend / trade pytest ≥336 / ruff / mypy / alembic up-down OK (本批次无 alembic 改动既有不破)；Frontend 不动 vitest ≥166 + Playwright ≥38 不破；safety regression 全绿 (含 v0.9.29 §12.8.1 test_runtime_dependencies_pinned.py；本批次按 pre-impl 裁决决议 #4 不引入新 dep 守门规则不动)；artifact grep SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL value / SEC EDGAR endpoint 字面值 0 命中；CI 完全离线 pytest --no-network 全过 (mock fixture)。L2 (真 VM): (1) Production VM 不动 (本批次纯离线 backfill + loader infra)；本批次产品代码改 trade/+workbench_api/+scripts/ 已在 v0.9.27 §12.7.1 修复后的 paths-trigger 内自然触 CI/Deploy 不需 dispatch 兜底；(2) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health 200 + version SHA 与 main HEAD 等价；(3) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/debug/recent-errors 返回 {"count":0,"records":[]}；(4) B026 banner 仍 enable 显示 不破；(5) Backfill 数据本机验证 (Evaluator 在本机跑)：find data/snapshots/fundamentals/sec_edgar/ -type d -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 wc -l = **27** (3 synthetic null CIK 不写 vendor 目录) / wc -l unified/fundamentals.csv **≥1000 rows ≈ 27 × 40** / load_fundamentals(['AAPL'], date(2026,5,1))['AAPL'].fiscal_quarter 输出最近 quarter / PIT spot check load_fundamentals(['AAPL'], as_of=date(2020,3,1)) 返回 ≤2020-Q1 之前；(6) PIT validation 报告通过 docs/test-reports/B029-pit-validation-2026-MM-DD.md (report_date >= fiscal_quarter_end + 30d，直接读 unified 第 4 列)；(7) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD (v0.9.25 §Production/HEAD 等价性) + Post-signoff Deploy 段 (v0.9.27 / §12.7.1)。Signoff: docs/test-reports/B029-fundamentals-snapshot-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md；docs/screenshots/B029-fundamentals/ ≥3 PNG (snapshots/fundamentals ls 结构 + AAPL fundamentals.csv 抽样 + PIT validation 报告)。Framework 候选：预期无重大；若 fix-round 出现 SEC EDGAR User-Agent ban / XBRL schema 变化 / ratio 公式不符等意外记录 signoff §Framework Learnings。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback。
